educationalNotes.summary: Retinal layer receiving raw RGB pixel matrices.
educationalNotes.detailed: Accepts normalized three-channel RGB images of size 224x224. This spatial standardization ensures weight compatibility in subsequent layers.

educationalNotes.keyTakeaway: Fixed input sizes are critical to prevent spatial alignment errors.

educationalNotes.summary: Zero padding for the large conv1 kernel.
educationalNotes.detailed: Pads borders with zeros to keep convolution dimensions matching standard Keras shapes.
educationalNotes.whyItMatters: Required to properly shape spatial grids in stem layers.

calculationSteps.explanation: 64 independent filters of size 7x7 operating over 3 input channels.

calculationSteps.label: Biases
